goal: Use Obsidian as the human governance layer for DC-Agent memory, with audited sync-back and approved-only runtime recall.

acceptance_criteria.description: Memory candidates export from data/nas_memory.db to Obsidian governance notes with stable memory_id, source_path, source_hash, review_status, sensitivity, and governance_version frontmatter.
Edited Obsidian governance notes import back into data/governed_memory.db idempotently without creating duplicate governed memories for the same memory_id.
Approved governed memories are promotable; rejected, merged, stale, and sensitive_blocked memories are not promoted to runtime recall by default.
Every Obsidian import decision and runtime promotion writes an append-only audit record with actor, action, memory_id, payload, and timestamp.
Runtime recall defaults to approved-only governed memories and excludes need_review, rejected, merged, stale, secret, and sensitive_blocked records unless an explicit admin path asks for them.

The production system preserves current NAS memory, Obsidian RawRefs, chat review capture, and dc_memory_context recall paths as reusable inputs instead of replacing them with an incompatible memory stack.
The first production version explicitly excludes an Obsidian native plugin, realtime Obsidian file watcher, bulk proactive review pings, and automatic deletion/forgetting from required scope.

non_goals: Do not replace data/nas_memory.db as the raw source memory index.
Do not require a native Obsidian plugin for the first production version.
Do not require realtime file watching for Obsidian edits in the first production version.
Do not use data/agy_review_candidates as a production review queue.
Do not promote unreviewed or sensitive-blocked memory into default runtime recall.
Do not implement automatic deletion or forgetting before a retention policy exists.
Do not require full AstrBot KB write-back for assistants that can query governed NAS memory directly.
Do not add bulk proactive review pings as part of the first production version.

production_recall: optional AstrBot KB mirror for compatibility
